facebook.caption:
POV: you ducked into Hẻm 118 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo looking for a cold beer. You found your new regular spot.

The Cheeky Traveller English Pub & Bar hits different when you're three weeks into Southeast Asia and craving something familiar. Cold pints. Loud laughs. 4.8 stars across 882 reviews. That's not luck.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Cold pint. Familiar vibe. Down a lane off Trần Hưng Đạo. The Cheeky Traveller English Pub & Bar pulls 4.8 stars for a reason. Walk in. You'll stay longer than planned.
